findings.issue: Project Knowledge files (architecture.md, patterns.md) not found. Cannot verify file paths and naming patterns against project conventions.
findings.fix: Create .claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/architecture.md and patterns.md, or accept that standards compliance check is skipped for this feature.

findings.issue: Task 8 (Code Audit) has no 'Files to modify' and no 'Files to read' fields. Audit tasks need 'Files to read' to know what to audit.
findings.fix: Add 'Files to read' listing all source files created in the feature: src/parser.js, src/state.js, src/writer.js, src/logger.js, workflow/prompt-pipeline.json.

findings.issue: Task 9 (Security Audit) has no 'Files to modify' and no 'Files to read' fields. Security audit needs explicit file scope.
findings.fix: Add 'Files to read' listing all source files: src/parser.js, src/state.js, src/writer.js, src/logger.js, workflow/prompt-pipeline.json.

findings.issue: Task 10 (Test Audit) has no 'Files to modify' and no 'Files to read' fields. Test audit needs to know which test files to review.
findings.fix: Add 'Files to read' listing all test files: src/parser.test.js, src/state.test.js, src/writer.test.js.

findings.issue: Task 11 (Pre-deploy QA) has no 'Files to modify' and no 'Files to read' fields.
findings.fix: Add 'Files to read' with all source and test files, plus user-spec.md and tech-spec.md for acceptance criteria verification.

findings.issue: Task 12 (Deploy) has no 'Files to modify' and no 'Files to read' fields.
findings.fix: Add 'Files to read' listing deployment artifacts: workflow/prompt-pipeline.json, prompts/*.md, templates/*.json. Add 'Files to modify' if deploy scripts are needed.

findings.issue: Task 12 (Deploy) uses skill 'deploy-pipeline' but has 'Reviewers: none'. Per skills-and-reviewers.md, deploy-pipeline defaults to: code-reviewer, security-auditor, deploy-reviewer.
findings.fix: Set reviewers to 'code-reviewer, security-auditor, deploy-reviewer' or explicitly justify why reviewers are skipped.

findings.issue: Task 2 (Template Configs) creates 12 JSON config files but has no Verify-smoke field. Template configs define project structure and are consumed by prompts and workflow — validation is important.
findings.fix: Add Verify-smoke, e.g.: node -e "const c = require('./templates/landing-page.json'); console.log(c.id, c.stack, c.maxFiles)" to verify config loads correctly.

findings.issue: Task 4 (State Manager) has no Verify-smoke or Verify-user field. State manager handles file I/O and session persistence — this qualifies as external integration.
findings.fix: Add Verify-smoke, e.g.: node -e "const s = require('./src/state'); s.save('/tmp/test-state.json', {id:'test'}); console.log(JSON.stringify(s.load('/tmp/test-state.json')))"

findings.issue: Task 5 (n8n Workflow — Core Flow) description is 4 sentences but covers a very broad scope: Form Triggers, Code nodes, parser integration, state manager integration, prompt template substitution, AND file generation loop. This is a large task that may benefit from splitting.
findings.fix: Consider splitting Task 5 into two tasks: (1) core workflow structure with Form Triggers and step chain, (2) prompt template substitution and file generation loop. Or accept as-is if the workflow JSON is a single artifact.

findings.issue: Dependencies subsection is titled '### Using existing (from project)' instead of the expected '### Using existing'.
findings.fix: Rename to '### Using existing' to match template exactly, or keep as-is if the meaning is clear.

summary: 5 critical findings: Tasks 8-12 (Audit Wave, Final Wave) lack required 'Files to read' / 'Files to modify' fields. 4 major findings: Task 12 missing reviewers for deploy-pipeline skill, Tasks 2 and 4 missing Verify-smoke for components with I/O, Task 5 broad scope. Tech-spec structure is solid overall — Decisions, Risks, Architecture, Data Models are well-documented. Fix critical findings (add file fields to audit/QA/deploy tasks) to get approved.
